# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: python-webapp
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: python-webapp
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: python-webapp
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: your-python-image # replace with actual Python Image
        ports:
          - containerPort: 5000
